source: Saudi Sale public Metabase listing package card 95
data_coverage: Live package-count data from 2026-03-01 to 2026-06-13; like-for-like comparison is against the same calendar dates in 2025 only.
price_rule: Total revenue combines estimated individual-ad package revenue plus paid commission from the commission listing report. Estimated individual-ad revenue: Regular SAR 115 before 18 May 2026 and SAR 184 from 18 May 2026; Special SAR 345 before 18 May 2026 and SAR 460 from 18 May 2026; Private SAR 805. Commission revenue uses commission_amount only where commission_paid = نعم in the commission listing report. Showroom/dealer listing revenue is SAR 0. 2025 LFL revenue uses historical pre-price-change package prices (Regular SAR 115, Special SAR 345, Private SAR 805) plus paid commission from the 2025 commission report.
